brand.name: BookedOnCall
brand.tagline: AI phone assistant for trades businesses
brand.description: BookedOnCall is an AI phone assistant for home-service businesses that answers inbound calls, captures the job details, and moves each caller toward booking or a clear callback based on the shop's setup.

positioning.oneLiner: BookedOnCall is an AI phone assistant for home-service businesses that answers inbound calls, captures the job details, and moves each caller toward booking or a clear callback based on the shop's setup.

validatedCapabilities: Answers inbound calls for plumbing, HVAC, electrical, painting, flooring, landscaping, and general home-service businesses.
Collects caller name, callback number, address, job details, and service notes.
Can offer appointments when scheduling is enabled and a supported calendar or scheduling tool is connected.
Works with Jobber, Google Calendar, and customer text messaging for supported follow-up flows.
Delivers a clear call summary and the next step, whether that is a booked appointment or a callback request.
Can send follow-up texts when customer messaging is turned on.

sourcedProof.title: 54% said they would not leave a voicemail
sourcedProof.detail: In Moneypenny's 2023 Censuswide survey of UK and US consumers, over half said they would not leave a voicemail when calling a business.

sourcedProof.title: Fast response can increase your ability to receive leads
sourcedProof.detail: Google says consistently fast response time can improve ad ranking and increase a provider's ability to receive leads.

sourcedProof.title: $17.90/hour median receptionist wage
sourcedProof.detail: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics reported a median hourly wage of $17.90 for receptionists in May 2024.

integrations.name: Jobber
integrations.description: Connect Jobber so BookedOnCall fits the scheduling process you already use.

integrations.name: Google Calendar
integrations.description: Connect Google Calendar so BookedOnCall can check availability and book supported appointments.

integrations.name: Text / SMS
integrations.description: Use customer text messaging for supported follow-up, confirmations, and callback communication.

integrations.name: QuickBooks
integrations.description: Coming soon: QuickBooks is the next targeted integration on the roadmap for customer context and office follow-up.

plans.name: Starter
plans.summary: For owner-operators and growing shops that want a better first response, clear callback coverage, and straightforward setup.
features: AI call answering and lead intake
Callback capture and clear handoff when you want to step in
Booking when your setup allows it
Jobber or Google Calendar integration when connected
Call summaries with the next step clearly laid out

plans.name: Pro
plans.summary: For businesses that want more included minutes and a more branded caller experience.
features: AI call answering and lead intake
Callback capture and clear handoff when you want to step in
Booking when your setup allows it
Jobber or Google Calendar integration when connected
Call summaries with the next step clearly laid out
Give the assistant a custom name
Customize the greeting and assistant behavior
